_meta.params_note: params is YEAR-KEYED ("2025": {…}). It is the designed home for jurisdiction-scoped, LAW-DERIVED estimated-tax RATE params (W2.4): self_employment (SECA), income_tax (blended-effective ESTIMATE rate), safe_harbor (IRC §6654), set_aside guidance, and corporate (flat rate). Every year block carries a citation. A rate change or a new year is a seed-file edit — never an inline constant in app code (centralization gate; Roadmap 3c). State rows carry only the state-specific blocks (income_tax + safe_harbor); the app folds them on top of federal. Amounts are in minor units (cents).

income_tax.note: blended-effective estimate, not a bracket calculation
blended-effective CA estimate, added on top of federal
